## Environment

Please fill in all fields — these are the exact signals the extension monitors.

- **VS Code version:** (e.g., 1.93.0)
- **Cursor version:** (if applicable; e.g., 0.48.0)
- **Discord version:** (e.g., Stable 0.0.320)
- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 15.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Agent CLI used:** (e.g., claude, aider, codex, gemini, opencode)
- **Shell:** (e.g., bash, zsh, fish, PowerShell, Command Prompt)

## Debug Logs

Set `agentMode.debug.verbose: true` in VS Code settings, reproduce the issue, then paste the "Agent Mode (Discord)" output channel contents below.

> Note: redact any sensitive paths before posting (e.g., replace `/Users/yourname/` with `/Users/<redacted>/`).
